challenges.name: Litter
challenges.keyTakeaway: Windows filesystem artifacts analysis — parsing LNK files, Prefetch data, and jump lists to reconstruct user activity on a compromised system

challenges.name: Lockpick
challenges.keyTakeaway: Ransomware investigation fundamentals — identifying encrypted files, recovering originals, and tracing ransomware execution artifacts

challenges.name: Lockpick2.0
challenges.keyTakeaway: Advanced ransomware forensics — registry analysis for persistence mechanisms, Group Policy abuse, and scheduled task forensics

challenges.name: KeePass
challenges.keyTakeaway: Password manager forensics — extracting and analyzing KeePass database artifacts, memory dumps for master keys, and credential recovery

challenges.name: OpTinselTrace-2
challenges.keyTakeaway: Windows Shellbag forensics — reconstructing folder navigation history to trace attacker lateral movement and data access patterns

challenges.name: CrownJewel-2
challenges.keyTakeaway: Active Directory forensics — extracting and analyzing ntds.dit to identify compromised domain accounts and credential theft

challenges.name: PersistenceIsFutile
challenges.keyTakeaway: Windows persistence mechanism detection — identifying registry-based persistence including Run keys, services, scheduled tasks, and COM hijacking

challenges.name: Jingle
challenges.keyTakeaway: Full disk image investigation — mounting and triaging a Windows disk image to reconstruct an incident from filesystem and registry artifacts

challenges.name: Fragility
challenges.keyTakeaway: NTFS deep dive — MFT parsing, USN Journal analysis, and $LogFile examination to recover evidence of deleted and modified files

challenges.name: OpTinselTrace-4
challenges.keyTakeaway: Advanced Windows disk forensics — correlating multiple artifact types (event logs, registry, filesystem) for comprehensive incident reconstruction

challenges.name: Jugglin
challenges.keyTakeaway: Container forensics — analyzing Docker images, container layers, and overlay filesystems to investigate containerized application compromises

challenges.name: ShadowRoast
challenges.keyTakeaway: Volume Shadow Copy forensics — extracting evidence from VSS snapshots, recovering deleted credentials, and analyzing shadow copy-based attack techniques
